task_completion.description: Verify the correct title is entered into the Third Party Risk form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text input field labeled 'Title' or 'Name' containing exactly 'Cloud Provider Data Breach - TechCloud Solutions'.

task_completion.description: Verify the description is entered with the required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text area labeled 'Description' containing the keywords 'TechCloud Solutions' and 'HIPAA'.

task_completion.description: Verify the threats are specified in the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a field or text area labeled 'Threats' containing the keywords 'unauthorized' and 'exfiltration'.

task_completion.description: Verify the vulnerabilities are specified in the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a field or text area labeled 'Vulnerabilities' containing the keywords 'shared tenancy' and 'segmentation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Risk Mitigation Strategy is set to Mitigate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown, select box, or radio button labeled 'Risk Mitigation Strategy' or 'Strategy' with the option 'Mitigate' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the review date is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a date picker or text input labeled 'Review Date' or 'Next Review Date' showing '2025-07-15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new Third Party Risk entry is successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success notification (e.g., 'Item created successfully') or the newly created 'Cloud Provider Data Breach - TechCloud Solutions' entry visible in the Third Party Risk list/table view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Eramba web GUI to create the entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Eramba interface, not terminal commands (like curl or direct database SQL inserts).

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered data into the actual Eramba application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be visible inside Eramba's web forms, not typed into a separate text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM to display the risk entry.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected title is exactly 'Cloud Provider Data Breach - TechCloud Solutions'. The description must contain 'TechCloud Solutions' and 'HIPAA'. The threats field must contain 'unauthorized' and 'exfiltration'. The vulnerabilities field must contain 'shared tenancy' and 'segmentation'. The Risk Mitigation Strategy should be set to 'Mitigate' (internal ID 3). The Review Date must be '2025-07-15'.
